activities.details: Glough's evil plans have been foiled! The Grand Tree is safe from his threats...for now!
I levelled my Attack skill, I am now level 47.
Khazard's attempt to weaken the defences of the Tree Gnome village have been stymied! The village is safe again.
I levelled my Farming skill, I am now level 32.
I levelled my Dungeoneering skill, I am now level 45.
I killed 2 boss monsters   called:  Lexicus Runewright    in Daemonheim.
activities.text: I killed 2 boss monsters in Daemonheim.

activities.details: I have breached floor 22 of Daemonheim for the first time.
I levelled my Dungeoneering skill, I am now level 45.
I have breached floor 21 of Daemonheim for the first time.
I levelled my Attack skill, I am now level 46.
I have unlocked a total of 500 songs, the last of which was Adorno IV.
I levelled my Defence skill, I am now level 70.
I levelled my Crafting skill, I am now level 65.
I levelled my Runecrafting skill, I am now level 51.
I levelled my Fletching skill, I am now level 51.
I was duped into helping an assassin steal a relic from Entrana, but at least the Temple Knights are investigating these events.
I levelled my Magic skill, I am now level 61.
Completing Desert Treasure has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 80 QP milestone.
After recovering the four diamonds of Azzanadra, I found a strange being in the heart of a pyramid who taught me a thing or two about magic.
I levelled my Necromancy skill, I am now level 70.
